name: xcodeproj
description: Xcodeproj lets you create and modify Xcode projects

options.name: --version
options.description: Show the version of the tool

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help banner of specified command

subcommands.name: config-dump
subcommands.description: Dumps the build settings of all project targets for all configurations in directories named by the target in the given output directory

subcommands.name: project-diff
subcommands.description: Shows the difference between two projects

options.name: --ignore
options.description: A key to ignore in the comparison. Can be specified multiple times

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Shows an overview of a project in a YAML representation

options.name: --group-option
options.description: The position of the groups when sorting. If no option is specified sorting will interleave groups and files

subcommands.name: target-diff
subcommands.description: Shows the difference between two targets

options.name: --project
options.description: The Xcode project document to use
